# opnsense_quagga_ospf6_prefixlist (Resource)

Manages an OSPFv3 prefix list on OPNsense.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `action` (String) Action: permit or deny.
- `name` (String) Prefix list name.
- `network` (String) Network/CIDR to match.
- `seq_number` (Number) Sequence number.

### Optional

- `enabled` (Boolean) Whether this entry is enabled.

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) Resource identifier.
